subject: Art and Design

lesson.title: 9 DRAWING AND PAINTING FROM STILL LIFE
topics: In this topic, the learners will acquire skills such as, creativity, observation and analytical
thinking. Still life drawing and painting is an artistic style that captures the aesthetics and essence
of static objects, often arranged in deliberate compositions. From everyday household items like
fruit and books to symbolic or luxurious objects, artists use light, colour, texture, proportion and
activities:  out-door (a stack of arranged rocks, at the scrap metal junk yard, part of an engine
Pencils: Graphite, charcoal, or coloured pencils used for drawing.
assessment:  Evaluate Still life drawings based on shape, texture, form, value (light and dark),
works, promoting critical thinking and constructive criticism.
In this sub-topic, different pictures were composed from Still-life drawing and or
painting. The key techniques and principles acquired and applied were, observation,
rendering, composition, colour theory, lighting and shading.
